message:
feat(tui): add velocity sparklines and stale indicators to label dashboard

Label dashboard list now shows per-label velocity as a 3-char sparkline
(▓▓▓ high / ▒▒░ medium / ░░░ low / ▁▁▁ stale) and STALE tag when
freshness.stale_count > 0. Also shows blocked count instead of closed
count since blocked is more actionable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
